configurePresets.name: release
configurePresets.description: Optimized build, no sanitizers.  Default for running tests.

configurePresets.name: asan
configurePresets.description: Debug build with AddressSanitizer and UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer compiled in.

configurePresets.name: compute-san
configurePresets.description: Release build with -lineinfo; ctest wraps every test executable with compute-sanitizer --tool memcheck.

testPresets.name: default
testPresets.description: Run the full test suite against the Release build.

testPresets.name: asan
testPresets.description: Run the full test suite against the ASan+UBSan build. Because ASan is baked into shared libraries (.so), LD_PRELOAD must be set so the runtime initialises before main(). Run as: LD_PRELOAD=$(gcc -print-file-name=libasan.so) ctest --preset asan

testPresets.name: compute-san
testPresets.description: Run the full test suite under 'compute-sanitizer --tool memcheck'.  Requires compute-sanitizer on PATH.  Each test executable is prefixed via CROSSCOMPILING_EMULATOR.

testPresets.name: compute-san-stages
testPresets.description: Stage unit tests only, under compute-sanitizer memcheck.

testPresets.name: compute-san-pipeline
testPresets.description: Pipeline integration tests only, under compute-sanitizer memcheck.
